steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content: We are given $$g(x)=\frac{x}{2}$$ and need $$g(x)=620$$. Substitute the expression for $$g(x)$$:$$ \frac{x}{2}=620 $$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content: Multiply both sides by 2 to isolate $$x$$: $$ x = 620 \times 2 = 1240 $$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
